overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through the bustling streets of Night City. The character navigates through a futuristic urban environment featuring towering skyscrapers, neon advertisements, and busy pedestrian intersections under clear midday sun.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway under highway overpass

events.description: exits covered overpass area into open sunlit street

agents.ego_description: walking along the red-painted sidewalk beneath a concrete overpass, following a child pedestrian ahead

notable_agents.action: child in white jacket with yellow backpack walking ahead of ego
adult male in dark clothing walking alongside the child

entered.detail: large concrete highway overpass spanning across the street above
concrete wall covered in colorful graffiti tags and street art
large digital screen displaying '35% OFF' advertisement with a woman's face
tall modern building with reflective glass facade
tall palm trees lining the right side of the street

segments.scene_description: The segment begins under a massive concrete highway overpass with graffiti-covered walls. The character walks along a red-painted sidewalk following a child and adult, passing digital billboards advertising sales. Around the 6-second mark, the scene transitions from the shaded overpass into bright open sunlight.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial street approaching major intersection with distinctive red architecture

agents.ego_description: continuing down the sidewalk toward a large intersection with a distinctive red parking structure on the right

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in white outfit walking toward the camera on the sidewalk

entered.detail: tall red and gray multi-level parking garage with open concrete levels
large advertisement showing 'THE BODY WITHOUT LIMITS' with a reclining figure
futuristic white and blue metro station entrance with neon lighting

segments.scene_description: Walking along the open sunlit sidewalk, the character approaches a major intersection dominated by a striking red parking structure on the right. The scene features a metro station kiosk and large billboards advertising body modification, with moderate pedestrian traffic moving in both directions.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy pedestrian crosswalk at major intersection with traffic control

events.description: begins crossing the wide street at a marked crosswalk with a crowd of pedestrians
vehicles wait at the red traffic light as the crowd continues crossing

agents.ego_description: crossing the wide intersection amidst a dense crowd of pedestrians while cars wait at the traffic light

notable_agents.action: black sedan stopped at the intersection waiting for pedestrians to cross
group of pedestrians crossing in the same direction toward the red building

entered.detail: tall vertical sign with 'AUTOPARTS' and 'CARSERVICE' text in green and red
large metal structure spanning the road with traffic lights and pink banners
wide striped pedestrian crossing painted on the asphalt

segments.scene_description: The character enters a busy crosswalk filled with pedestrians crossing the wide street. A prominent vertical 'AUTOPARTS' sign marks the left side while vehicles wait at the red light. The crowd moves together across the striped crosswalk beneath the traffic light gantry.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial sidewalk with storefronts and elevated advertising highways

events.description: finishes crossing the street and continues along the sidewalk past commercial storefronts

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk passing by the CUTTECH storefront and various digital billboards under elevated highways

entered.detail: store entrance with illuminated 'CUTTECH' sign in blue neon
elevated highway overpass covered with large digital advertisements
multiple large digital screens displaying various advertisements on building facades

segments.scene_description: Having crossed the intersection, the character walks along a commercial sidewalk lined with stores including a CUTTECH outlet. Elevated highways covered in advertisements span overhead while pedestrians walk in opposing directions and traffic moves along the street.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit intersection with large digital advertisements and pink structural lighting

events.description: approaches a brightly lit intersection with prominent pink neon structural columns and massive digital billboards
crossing the street at the neon-lit intersection while vehicles pass by

agents.ego_description: crossing the intersection surrounded by towering digital billboards and vibrant pink neon lights, with moderate pedestrian traffic

notable_agents.action: red sports car driving through the intersection

entered.detail: tall structural columns illuminated with bright pink neon lights supporting the overpass
massive vertical digital screens displaying colorful advertisements including 'BRAIN DANCE' content

segments.scene_description: The final segment features a visually striking intersection dominated by massive digital billboards and distinctive pink neon-lit structural columns. The character crosses the street amidst moderate pedestrian traffic while a red sports car drives through the intersection, surrounded by the vibrant neon advertising typical of Night City's commercial district.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the shaded depths of a concrete underpass into the vibrant, neon-saturated commercial heart of Night City. It begins beneath a graffiti-covered highway overpass on a red sidewalk, following other pedestrians past digital billboards before emerging from the shadows into bright, open sunlight. As the camera moves forward, the scene opens up to a major intersection featuring a striking red parking structure and body modification advertisements, eventually leading the character into a crowded crosswalk beneath a traffic light gantry and a prominent autoparts sign. The path then shifts along a commercial strip lined with stores like CUTTECH under elevated highways, before finally arriving at a visually striking intersection dominated by massive digital billboards and pink neon-lit columns as a red sports car drives past.
